# Iyad Barakat — The Consulting Prompt Playbook

> Iyad Barakat is a strategy consultant and the author of *The Consulting
> Prompt Playbook*. His work helps consultants and strategy professionals use
> AI as a rigorous thinking partner — through six prompting frameworks, a
> library of ready-to-run prompts, and practical workflows for client-grade
> analysis, research, meetings and deliverables.

## The six frameworks
The backbone of the method — one framework for each recurring shape of
consulting work:

- GOAL — Goal / Output / Audience & Context / Leverage. A fast daily brief.
- RCAS — Role / Context / Ask / Style. Structured analytical prompting.
- RISE — for iterative, multi-step reasoning and refinement.
- CRISP-C — board-level communication and storyline.
- CAPE — for pressure-testing and de-risking AI output.
- IDEA — for ideation and option generation.

## The book
*The Consulting Prompt Playbook* by Iyad Barakat — the six frameworks plus 100
super-prompts for consulting work. Available on Amazon (ASIN B0G5HBCZG2).

## Products (the value ladder)
- The Frameworks — free lead magnet; all six frameworks by email.
- The Book — the full method, on Amazon.
- The Vault — 100 ready-to-run super-prompts, each with template and
  adaptation notes.
- The Operating System — the premium, end-to-end operating system for
  consulting with AI.

## Key pages
- https://iyadbarakat.com/ — brand hub and overview.
- https://iyadbarakat.com/blog/ — Insights: practical essays on AI for
  consultants (tools, frameworks, workflows).
- https://iyadbarakat.com/frameworks/ — the free six frameworks.
- https://iyadbarakat.com/book/ — the book.
- https://iyadbarakat.com/vault/ — the Vault (100 super-prompts).
- https://iyadbarakat.com/operating-system/ — the Operating System.
- https://iyadbarakat.com/about/ — about Iyad Barakat.

## Notes
- Voice: first-person, warm, practical, British spelling.
- Theme: humans thinking and thriving with AI and with other people.
- Contact and subscription via the site's newsletter form.
